title: Physematium × maxonii
taxonomy: Physematium × maxonii is classified within the family of Bristlecone Pines (Pinaceae), specifically within the genus Pinus. It is a hybrid species of pine, resulting from a cross between different species of Pinus. This hybrid species is native to the mountains of South America. Its classification is further detailed at the subspecies level, with some sources recognizing it as Pinus maxonii. However, it is worth noting that the classification of this species may be subject to change as new research emerges.
